title: Yale - YE3CB/20/121/1/BK Standard Security 20mm Aluminium Combination Padlock - Black - Open Steel Shackle - 3 dial Combination Lock
features: DESIGNED FOR INDOOR USAGE: Helps you secure your locker, rucksack or other belongings you need to secure indoors.
RIGOROUSLY TESTED: Tested up to 48 hours for corrosion resistance to ensure protection against weather conditions with a CEN rating of 2.
CONVENIENCE & SECURITY: Aluminium body with single locking, a steel shackle and 3 dials. Users can easily set dial lock to a memorial Combination with 1,000 Combinations to choose from.
EXCLUSIVE YALE DESIGN: With a range of colours to choose from and different sizes from 20mm to 38mm to suit your security needs
BODY MATERIAL: Aluminium body with single locking, a steel shackle and 3 dials
description: From the manufacturer Personalise and protect with these combination padlocks. Featuring steel shackles and an easy to- use combination dial. These padlocks are available in three sizes and five different colours, so you can be sure to find the right one for you. Yale Aluminium Combination Padlocks Features: Standard Protection Padlocks Easy dial lock setting with over 1,000 combinations to choose from Locking mechanism: single locking Tested up to 48 hours for corrosion resistance to ensure protection against weather conditions Colours available in black, silver, gold, red and blue A padlock for everyday use These padlocks come in three sizes and five different colours to suit your everyday needs and feature an easy-to-use combination dial. Suitable to secure your everyday belongings Protect your gym locker, rucksack, tool box or other belongings you want to keep safe and secure indoors. Convenient access Set your own memorable numerical combination using the easy to use dial and gain quick and convenient access with no need to use keys. Trusted quality Protect your items with an Aluminium padlock with single locking, a open steel shackle and a 3 or 4-dial combination lock.
